name: list-by-fullforms
title: List by FullForms
description: Search and add abbreviations, full forms, and glossary terms from Raycast.
author: mithunmathew

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Entries
commands.subtitle: List by FullForms
commands.description: Search across your lists and entries.

commands.name: add-entry
commands.title: Quick Add Entry
commands.subtitle: List by FullForms
commands.description: Create a new entry on a list you can edit.

commands.name: suggest-entry
commands.title: Suggest Entry
commands.subtitle: List by FullForms
commands.description: Suggest a new entry on a list. The owner reviews before it appears.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Generate one at list.fullforms.com/account under API tokens.

preferences.name: apiBase
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Leave as default unless you've been given a custom endpoint.
